body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/98449009?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/whatisproblem", "id": 98449009, "login": "whatisproblem", "node_id": "U_kgDOBd42cQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/whatisproblem", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44794", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact In the case of inter-object references via `GenericForeignKey` (a pattern allowing an object to reference another object that may belong to one of several different "content types" or database tables), when creating or updating an object containing a `GenericForeignKey`, Nautobot's REST API failed to enforce user "view" permissions when determining whether a given reference to another object would be valid. As a concrete example, a user: - who has permission to create or update `ImageAttachment` records - but who lacks permission to view (some or all) `Device` records - _but who knows (via some other mechanism) the UUID of a specific `Device` that they do not otherwise have access to_ could create via the REST API an `ImageAttachment` linked to that specific `Device`. Other models that use `GenericForeignKey` and may be writable via the REST API, and hence have a similar vulnerability to `ImageAttachment`, may include: - `ApprovalWorkflow` - `Cable` - `ConfigContext` - `ContactAssociation` - `DataCompliance` - `Device` - `ExportTemplate` - `GraphQLQuery` - `Note` - `ObjectMetadata` - `RelationshipAssociation` - `StaticGroupAssociation` - `VirtualMachine` Additionally, any Nautobot Apps that provide models with a REST API and use GenericForeignKey may have a similar vulnerability for their models. ### Patches A general-purpose fix has been implemented in Nautobot 2.4.33 and 3.1.2, which ensures correct application of "view" permissions when creating or modifying object references via `GenericForeignKey` throughout the REST API. Individual models/views/serializers generally will not require any specific code changes to benefit from this fix. ### Workarounds No known workarounds at this time. ### References - 2.4.33 (patch) - 3.1.2 (patch)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00177, "percentile": 0.07409}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-13T15:30:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44794"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T18:16:33Z", "published_at": "2026-05-13T15:30:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/security/advisories/GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/commit/36cde7148a207234de6212ec074f321dbc9d1b5b", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/commit/9918bdb9bcf1eb42cda72c344f420a64ef7665f1", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/releases/tag/v2.4.33", "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot/releases/tag/v3.1.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44794", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nautobot/nautobot/security-advisories/GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nautobot/nautobot", "summary": "Nautobot: REST API permits creation of GenericForeignKey references to objects that the user should not be able to reference", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T02:01:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wpxj-44w3-2j6x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "nautobot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0a2, < 3.1.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.4.33", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "nautobot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.33"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Nautobot: REST API permits creation of GenericForeignKey references to objects that the user should not be able to reference
